query:
UPDATE tachyon_apps_order.consumer_orders
            SET status = ?,
                confirmed_at = COALESCE(?, confirmed_at),
                shipped_at = COALESCE(?, shipped_at),
                delivered_at = COALESCE(?, delivered_at),
                cancelled_at = COALESCE(?, cancelled_at)
            WHERE tenant_id = ? AND id = ?
